mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_memory_profile (user_id, `key`, value, source, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{key}, #{value}, #{source}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, `key`, value, source, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_memory_profile WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, `key`, value, source, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_memory_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND `key` = #{key}
